Bash(CLAUDECODE= git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(backend\): harden security with 12 vulnerability fixes

- Remove .env.production from git tracking \(contained live secrets\)
- Differentiate access/refresh/reset tokens via JWT Subject claims
- Stop returning tokens in response body \(httpOnly cookies only\)
- Verify user exists on token refresh \(prevent deleted user access\)
- Move debug endpoints behind AdminOnly middleware
- Fix rate limit IP spoofing with TrustProxy config
- Add magic-byte validation and extension whitelist for uploads
- Enforce password max length \(128 chars\) for bcrypt safety
- Fix admin handler unbounded body decode \(use 1MB-limited decodeJSON\)
- Remove Stripe error message leak to client
- Add rate limiting to upload and admin endpoints
- Expand backend and frontend test coverage for security changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(CLAUDECODE= git add web/src/components/Modal.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: modal dialog quedaba detrás del backdrop por z-index duplicado

El backdrop tenía z-[200] propio siendo fixed, lo que lo sacaba del stacking
context del wrapper y tapaba el dialog. Removiendo el z-index del backdrop,
queda en el flujo del wrapper \(z-[200]\) y el dialog lo supera por orden DOM.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(unset CLAUDECODE && git add web/src/components/Modal.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: modal dialog quedaba detrás del backdrop por z-index duplicado

El backdrop tenía z-[200] propio siendo fixed, lo que lo sacaba del stacking
context del wrapper y tapaba el dialog. Removiendo el z-index del backdrop,
queda en el flujo del wrapper \(z-[200]\) y el dialog lo supera por orden DOM.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)
